  150000         1  TABLE SCAN sql - orders WHERE o.o_custkey = 1L
queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(c.c_custkey)
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM tpch_sf1.customer
  WHERE c_custkey = 1
) AS c
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM tpch_sf1.orders AS o
  WHERE o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
);

theorem.description: Count CUSTOMER rows without a matching ORDERS row via NOT EXISTS with a one-sided CUSTOMER key filter
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-ANTI-CUSTOMER-ORDERS-FILTER-CUSTOMER
